title: Perplexity AI vs. ChatGPT for research — real comparison
post:
I've used both extensively for research over the past six months. Here's my honest take: they're different tools for different jobs.

Perplexity excels at surfacing current information quickly and citing sources. It's my go-to when I need to understand what's happening right now in a field. ChatGPT (with browsing) is better for deep dives, nuanced analysis, and working through complex ideas where I need to iterate on concepts.

Neither is universally better. The skill is knowing which to reach for and when.

What's your experience been with AI research tools? Thoughts?
